app.description: Call a controller on the on-prem service straight from the browser via an Azure Relay Hybrid Connection.

errors.configMissing: Relay configuration missing. Set VITE_RELAY_NAMESPACE, VITE_HC_NAME, VITE_SAS_KEY_NAME and VITE_SAS_KEY in client/.env.

auth.registerSuccess: Account created. You can now log in.
auth.mfaDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
auth.mfaSetupDescription: Scan this QR code with Microsoft Authenticator (or another authenticator app), then enter the code it shows to enable two-factor authentication.
auth.mfaAlreadyEnabled: Two-factor authentication is enabled. Enter your password to disable it.
auth.mfaRecoveryCodesDescription: Save these recovery codes somewhere safe. Each can be used once to sign in if you lose access to your authenticator app.
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email address and we'll send you a code to reset your password.
auth.forgotPasswordSuccess: If that email is registered, a reset code has been sent. Check your inbox.
auth.resetPasswordDescription: Enter the code from the email along with your new password.
auth.resetPasswordSuccess: Your password has been reset. You can now log in.
